title: Validate and audit convergence
description: Run complete locked Python, Rust, host C, Zephyr/Twister, canonical-vector, simulator/fleet, and production-board gates on the convergence branch. Perform workspace API review and three independent final reviews, reconcile Beads exports, audit residual branches, and prepare the final merge boundary.
acceptance_criteria: All required gates pass with zero unexpected skips or stale generated files; three reviews converge; every residual blocker and branch disposition is recorded; worktree is clean except approved artifacts; final branch/commit hashes are documented.
close_reason: Validation and audit completed per acceptance criteria; gates passed; reviews converged; Beads reconciled; merge boundary prepared with commit 6858c37e0
